mapper.select: SELECT event_id, title, description, event_type, owner_id, dept_id, start_dt, end_dt, all_day, color, location, created_at FROM platform_v3.cal_event WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND start_dt < #{endDt}::timestamptz AND end_dt > #{startDt}::timestamptz AND (owner_id = #{ownerId} OR event_type IN ('DEPT','COMPANY')) AND (dept_id = #{deptId} OR event_type = 'COMPANY') AND event_type = #{eventType} ORDER BY start_dt

SELECT event_id, title, event_type, start_dt, end_dt, all_day, color FROM platform_v3.cal_event WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND DATE(start_dt) = CURRENT_DATE AND (owner_id = #{ownerId} OR event_type IN ('DEPT','COMPANY')) AND (dept_id = #{deptId} OR event_type = 'COMPANY') ORDER BY start_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.cal_event (title, description, event_type, owner_id, dept_id, start_dt, end_dt, all_day, color, location, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{eventType}, #{ownerId}, #{deptId}, #{startDt}::timestamptz, #{endDt}::timestamptz, COALESCE(#{allDay}, false), #{color}, #{location}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_v3.cal_event SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, start_dt = #{startDt}::timestamptz, end_dt = #{endDt}::timestamptz, all_day = COALESCE(#{allDay}, all_day), color = COALESCE(#{color}, color), location = COALESCE(#{location}, location), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
